verification_protocols.description: Assert that 3-phase AC removes particles 1.8x faster than 2-phase AC.
verification_protocols.method: Measure simulation clearance duration at 1500V for both phase modes.

verification_protocols.description: Assert that clearing rate correlates positively with voltage amplitude.
Assert that small particles reach the panel boundary faster than medium and large particles.
verification_protocols.method: Observe individual size class velocity components under active EDS.
